positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for picuris_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != new_mexico).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    harding_pegmatite_mine != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != texas).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != harding_pegmatite_mine).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define visited(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define donated(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define located_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define mountain_range_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define false := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for picuris_negative.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas)).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    harding_pegmatite_mine != juan_de_onate).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != harding_pegmatite_mine).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != new_mexico).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    picuris_mountains != texas).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define visited(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define donated(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define false := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
